name: SPM
one_line_description: Durable, shareable and governed project memory for AI agents, delivered through a project-scoped remote MCP connector.
short_description: SPM gives agents memory they can actually use: relevant requirements, current decisions, completed work, source-backed context, temporal signals and governed sharing boundaries.
positioning: SPM turns project knowledge into durable, shareable, governed and internally smart memory that agents can query, verify and use safely.

authentication.token_source: SPM MCP setup console or browser-approved device flow

capabilities: Smart project memory that structures, summarizes, tags and relates project knowledge.
Temporal memory across original intent, working state, current truth and history.
Queryable context graphs, source traceability and item-level recall.
Scoped context packs for different agents, teams, partners or support flows.
MCP, CLI and API use inside agent workflows.
Access control, permissions, expirations, revocation and audit logs.
Provenance, hashes and verification for the context an agent receives.
Policy and hardening checks before consequential agent actions.
